codeReview.summary: Feature implementation matches the bootstrap requirements: pinned dependency versions are present in package.json, Vite/TypeScript/Vitest configs include the required options, index/main render a minimal hello app, and baseline test coverage exists with successful verification recorded in the handoff.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit diff for project-bootstrap. The delivered changes satisfy the feature description and expected behavior with no blocking or non-blocking issues identified.
